title: Effect Blocks
description: The datapack that gives blocks good (and bad) effects
body:
This is the perfect datapack for **Map Makers** (I am trying to make a map but I am too lazy and dumb...)
Because I couldn't find any similar datapack, I decided to do it myself.

This datapack comes with a texture pack. It is optional, but it improves the experience.
- Download DPRP version (v1.3)
- Install the optional resource pack in the versions tab (v1.4+)

## Effects from blocks:
- Diamond - Speed
- Emerald - Jump Boost
- Netherite - Speed + Jump Boost
- Gold Block - Slow Falling
- White Wool - Levitation
- Iron - Iron Efficiency (Haste and Strength)
- Redstone Block - Regeneration
- Coal - Blindness
- Black Concrete - Slowness
- Green Terracota - Nausea
- Chiseled Deepslate - Mining Fatigue
- Weathered Copper - Poison
- Regular Copper - Saturation
- Brown Terracotta - Hunger
- Red Concrete - Unalive

## Tokens!
I added some retextured emeralds (called tokens) into the datapack (as of v1.3). They give surtain effect, that are better than the blocks (these are more for creative mode users)
- Speed Token - Hold it and get a really big boost of speed!  
  ![The crafting recipe for Speed Token](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0daf44ec5a5ca99d3e0592d33c52b4cd2c91e5cb.png)  
  The potion here ↑ is Potion of Swiftness I (3:00)  
  
- Power Token - Hold it in Off-Hand to become really strong!  
  ![The crafting recipe for Power Token](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db2446e03ecc0bdd3c5a109dfa101129099621dc.png)  
  The potion here ↑ is Potion of Strength I (3:00)

- Health Token - Have the Token **anywhere** in your inventory to gain +20 hearts  
  ![Health Token Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aadcff62d4dcd700aab3bc2a2cee71e52840e46a.png)  
  The potion here ↑ is Potion of Healing I

- Regeneration Token - Hold it in your Off-Hand to regenerate  
  ![Regeneration Token Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99c72f877a59d58917317d7c07ca95e6bf2b9bf0.png)  
  The potion here ↑ is Potion of Regeneration I
  
More updates (and some touches to this site) in progress
If you want anything to be added, just tell me in the [issues tab on GitHub](https://github.com/AndrecodeInBrackets/Effect_Blocks_datapack/issues)
